## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavioral changes (`test/merge.test.mjs`, `test/runner.test.mjs`)
- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] If security-relevant (trigger matching, `osascript` invocation, `settings.json` merge), called out below
- [ ] Docs updated (README / SECURITY / CONTRIBUTING) if behavior or commands changed

## Security-relevant?

<!-- Describe any change to how untrusted text is handled, how osascript is invoked,
